summary: Verified iter217 ManagementShell roll-out to Cinema, Hotel, Laundry, Travel, Car-Rental + retroactive Banquet. All 6 pages render the single shared nav-card with required testids ({prefix}-nav-card, -title, -toggle-header, -refresh-btn), correct tab sets, and working Hide/Show toggle (collapsed pill + tabs removed; expand restores). Hotel 'Rooms' tab is correctly disabled until a hotel is selected. No 'Element type is invalid' / 'Cannot read properties of undefined' console errors on any tab.

hotel_/management/hotels (prefix=hotel-m.title: Hotel Management
hotel_/management/hotels (prefix=hotel-m.note: Review request listed URL as '/management/hotel' but actual App.jsx route is '/management/hotels' (plural). At /management/hotel the catch-all falls through to /admin/analytics. Tested correctly at /management/hotels.

testing_notes: Preview URL is heavily rate-limited by Cloudflare/Vite dev server (HTTP 429 on rapid module requests). When navigating fast across pages, JS chunks fail to load and pages render an empty <div id=root>. Inserting 30-60s cooldown between page navigations made all six pages render correctly.
Final isolated verification per page (with cooldown) confirmed every assertion in the review request.
No console error matching 'Element type is invalid' or 'Cannot read properties of undefined' was observed on any page or tab.
Hotel 'Rooms' tab pass-through `disabled` prop correctly arrives at the TabsTrigger (data-disabled / aria-disabled set when no hotel is selected).
action_items: (Cosmetic only) Update spec/docs to reference '/management/hotels' (plural) — current App.jsx route. The user-supplied test URL '/management/hotel' redirects to /admin/analytics via the catch-all.
Optional: harden the preview environment against Vite dev-server 429 throttling (not iter217-scope).
critical_code_review_comments: ManagementShell.jsx uses a template literal `grid-cols-${Math.min(tabs.length, 6)}` — Tailwind JIT may not generate dynamic class names. Works today because tab counts (3 or 4) are statically present elsewhere in the codebase, but adding a NEW page with e.g. 5 tabs could silently fall back to default grid. Suggest a safelist or static lookup map to avoid future regressions.

ManagementShell renders <Tabs> twice (nav card + content wrapper). Functionally fine via controlled value/onValueChange, but doubles event listeners. Consider moving TabsContent inside a single <Tabs> if a refactor opportunity arises.
test_credentials: superadmin@oryno.com / testpassword123 (verified via in-browser fetch /api/auth/login → localStorage)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All six management pages (Cinema, Hotel[at /management/hotels — plural], Laundry, Travel, CarRental, Banquet) use the shared ManagementShell and pass UI assertions. Preview URL is aggressively rate-limited by Cloudflare/Vite — when running multi-page Playwright tests, insert 30–60 s cooldown between navigations or pages will render an empty #root.
rca of the issue: No production bug. Apparent failure of Cinema/Hotel/CarRental on the first sweep was caused by HTTP 429 from the Vite dev-server / Cloudflare rate limiter throttling JS module chunks during rapid back-to-back navigations. With sufficient cooldown each page renders the ManagementShell correctly. Separately, the review-request URL '/management/hotel' is a typo — the actual route is '/management/hotels' (plural) in App.jsx; the singular URL falls through to /admin/analytics.
